# Frontaliere Ticino — AI-Readable Site Information
# Full documentation available at: https://frontaliereticino.ch/llms.txt
# Comprehensive domain knowledge: https://frontaliereticino.ch/llms-full.txt
# AI plugin manifest: https://frontaliereticino.ch/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
# Sitemap: https://frontaliereticino.ch/sitemap.xml

Frontaliere Ticino (https://frontaliereticino.ch) is the most comprehensive free resource for cross-border workers between Italy and Switzerland. It covers taxation (Swiss withholding tax + Italian IRPEF), pension planning (AVS/LPP/3rd pillar), health insurance (LAMal), currency exchange (CHF/EUR), work permits (G/B), and practical guides for ~79,000 frontalieri in Canton Ticino.

For detailed, citable information, see /llms-full.txt.
